MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for (trustee) David Madison.

Ms. Friedeberg reported that they will be e-filing the accounting today, that they just received the signatures. The Court took the status of filing an accounting off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

Petition To Bring Trust Under Court Supervision; For Appointment Of D. Madison, Ph.D. As Successor Trustee; And For Issuance Of Bond.
Off Calendar Oct-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for and with (petitioner) David Madison.

Ms. Friedeberg reported to the court that there have been no objections and that she felt bond in the amount of $330,000.00 is sufficient. The Court granted the petition to bring trust under court supervision, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
